Black Ant Author: Evelyn Mudaala Simfukwe Illustrator: David Chisha Translator: Brian Kavanagh
Black Ant plays in the mud.
Black Ant meets Yellow Cat, and they look at each other.
Black Ant and Yellow Cat climb a tree.
Yellow Cat falls down from the tree!
Black Ant climbs down the tree.
Black Ant looks at the bush.
Black Ant puts out the fire.
Blue Elephant comes over to the house.
Black Ant rests in the house.
